title: minimal-custom-node-contract
summary: INPUT_TYPES, RETURN_TYPES, FUNCTION, CATEGORY, function method, and NODE_CLASS_MAPPINGS registration.
use_when: What are the required pieces of a ComfyUI custom node?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

title: hidden-inputs
summary: Use for server/context metadata, image metadata, dynamic prompt expansion, and frontend/backend coordination.
use_when: When should a node use hidden inputs like PROMPT or UNIQUE_ID?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

title: lazy-evaluation
summary: Mark inputs lazy and implement check_lazy_status to request only necessary upstream inputs.
use_when: How do I prevent a ComfyUI node from evaluating unused branches?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

title: output-node
summary: Use for side-effect nodes such as save/export/logging or nodes that should be runnable as graph endpoints.
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

title: is-changed
summary: Use when randomness, external files, mutable state, or selectively ignored inputs affect cache correctness.
use_when: When does a custom node need IS_CHANGED?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

title: node-validation
summary: Validate file names, datatype assumptions, tensor shapes, model availability, and conflicting optional inputs early.
use_when: How should custom nodes validate inputs?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

title: v1-vs-v3
summary: Use V1 for broad compatibility with current packs; use V3 when needing richer schema, MultiType, MatchType, and forward features.
use_when: Should I write ComfyUI custom nodes in V1 or V3 schema?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

title: node-registration
summary: Export NODE_CLASS_MAPPINGS and optionally NODE_DISPLAY_NAME_MAPPINGS from the node pack.
use_when: How are ComfyUI custom nodes registered?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

title: dynamic-dropdowns
summary: INPUT_TYPES is a classmethod so options like model filename lists can be generated at runtime.
use_when: How do dynamic dropdown widgets work?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.

title: side-effect-safety
summary: Mark output when appropriate, make paths explicit, avoid hidden destructive operations, and keep reproducibility metadata.
use_when: How should nodes that write files/logs behave?
chunking_hint: Retrieve canonical overview and official source anchors with this card. Keep code examples intact.
